text: Five birds walk along the beach on a sunny day.
A group of elephants walking on grass in different directions.
a man standing next to a cow while standing in a barn.
A man in white shirt and blue shorts playing a game of tennis.
one whole donut with sprinkles sitting next to a half eaten donut on a brown paper bag.
A small galley kitchen showing stove, dishwasher, and sink
Three traffic lights, one green, the other yellow, and one red.
A large adult zebra stands in a pile of sand.
Three cranes standing on one leg in the water
Several boats in the water docked at a port.
